onboarding.allDoneDesc: Your workspace is ready to go. Welcome aboard!

onboardingWizard.welcomeDesc: A few quick steps and your workspace will be ready to go. We will guide you through the setup.
onboardingWizard.step3PreviewDesc: Once set up, you can start planning shifts right away.
onboardingWizard.locationDesc: Enter the name and optionally the address of your location.
onboardingWizard.employeeDesc: Create your first employee. You can add more later.
onboardingWizard.nameRequired: First and last name are required.
onboardingWizard.completeDesc: Your workspace is ready. You can now start creating shift schedules.

shiftPlan.title: Shift Plan
shiftPlan.description: Weekly view of your shift schedule
shiftPlan.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this shift?
shiftPlan.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this shift? This action cannot be undone.

form.title: New Shift
form.repeatWeeksHint: 0 = no repeat. Specifies how many weeks the shift is repeated for.
form.openShiftHint: Shift will be created without an employee. AI scheduling can auto-assign it later.

shiftPlan.autoScheduleDesc: Automatically assigns available employees to open shifts. Uses AI optimization considering availabilities, qualifications, fairness, costs, and ArbZG compliance.
shiftPlan.autoScheduleWeightsDesc: Adjust the weight of optimization objectives (0–100).
shiftPlan.autoScheduleNoOpenShiftsDesc: There are no unassigned shifts in the selected period. AI scheduling can only auto-assign open shifts.
shiftPlan.autoScheduleNoOpenShiftsStep1: Click the + button on a day cell in the shift plan
shiftPlan.autoScheduleNoOpenShiftsStep2: Select 'Open Shift (unassigned)' for the employee field
shiftPlan.openShiftCardHint: Unassigned — will be filled by AI scheduling
shiftPlan.backfillDesc: Instant replacement search for a shift vacancy. Finds the best available employee based on fairness, fatigue, qualifications, and rotation.
shiftPlan.cancelConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this shift? The shift will remain visible in the plan but marked as cancelled.
shiftPlan.unassignConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the employee from this shift? The shift will become an open shift.

timeTracking.noEntriesHint: Create a new time entry or change the selected period.
timeTracking.emptyTip1: Entries are automatically generated from shifts
timeTracking.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
timeTracking.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this time entry? This action cannot be undone.

form.documentHintKrank: Certificate of incapacity for work (AU) per §5 EntgFG
form.uploadError: File could not be uploaded. Please try again.

timeAccounts.noAccountsHint: Create an account for each employee to track overtime.
timeAccounts.allHaveAccounts: All employees already have a time account.

payrollExport.title: Payroll Export
payrollExport.description: Export working time data for payroll processing
payrollExport.infoBannerText: Export your employees’ confirmed working hours as a CSV file. You can import this file into your payroll software (e.g. DATEV, Lexware, SAGE) or send it directly to your tax advisor.
payrollExport.requirementConfirmed: Time entries must have the status “Confirmed”
payrollExport.requirementConfirmedHint: Unconfirmed entries are ignored. Confirm entries in Time Tracking.
payrollExport.requirementPeriod: Select a billing period (typically: previous month)
payrollExport.requirementPeriodHint: Usually you export the previous month’s data at the beginning of the current month.
payrollExport.step1Desc: Choose the billing period — e.g. the previous month.
payrollExport.step3Desc: Download the CSV file and import it into your payroll software.
payrollExport.datevHint: Semicolon-separated, German decimal notation (1.234,56). For DATEV, ADDISON, Agenda, and most German tax advisors.
payrollExport.csvHint: Comma-separated, English decimal notation (1,234.56). For Excel, Google Sheets, Lexware, SAGE.
payrollExport.noEntries: No confirmed time entries in the selected period.
payrollExport.noEntriesReason1: Time entries have not been confirmed yet (status: Draft or Pending)
payrollExport.noEntriesReason2: No entries exist in the selected period
payrollExport.noEntriesAction: Go to Time Tracking to confirm entries.
payrollExport.onlyConfirmed: Only confirmed time entries are exported.
payrollExport.helpText: Select a period and click “Preview” to review the data.
payrollExport.helpHint: The export contains only confirmed time entries and is compatible with DATEV, Lexware, and other payroll software.
payrollExport.datevExplainer: DATEV is the most widely used accounting software in Germany. Over 40,000 tax advisory firms use DATEV. The DATEV format uses semicolons and German decimal notation and can be directly imported into DATEV Lohn & Gehalt.
payrollExport.tipText: Ask your tax advisor which format they prefer. Most firms in Germany work with the DATEV format.

employeesPage.noEmployeesHint: Add your first employee to start building your schedule.

settings.twoFAEnabled: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully.
settings.twoFARecoveryDesc: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once. If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use one of these codes to sign in.
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Receive push notifications directly on your device.
settings.pushNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported on this browser or device. On iOS, the app must be installed as a PWA (iOS 16.4+).
settings.pushDenied: Push notifications have been blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
settings.ownershipTransferDesc: Transfer the owner role to another team member. You will be demoted to Admin.

settings.deleteWorkspaceMessage: This action cannot be undone. Enter your workspace name to confirm deletion.
settings.deleteWorkspaceMismatch: The entered name does not match the workspace.

billing.title: Subscription
billing.currentPlanDesc: Your active subscription and usage limits
billing.cancelsAtEnd: Cancels at end of billing period
billing.manageSubscriptionDesc: Change payment method, view invoices, or cancel — via the Stripe customer portal.
billing.planTeamDesc: For growing teams — unlimited employees, 3 locations
billing.securePaymentDesc: Your payment data is encrypted and processed directly by Stripe — we never store card details.
billing.faqCancelAnswer: Yes. You can cancel your plan anytime via the customer portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
billing.faqInvoice: Where can I find my invoices?
billing.faqInvoiceAnswer: All invoices are available through the Stripe customer portal. Click “Manage Subscription” above.
billing.faqTaxAnswer: Prices are shown excluding VAT. The applicable VAT is displayed during checkout. You can add your VAT ID at that time.
billing.sandboxBannerDesc: Billing changes are simulated — no real payments are processed. Plans update instantly in the database.
billing.checkoutError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
billing.simPortalMsg: Billing management is simulated — no Stripe portal available in sandbox mode.

roles.title: Roles and Permissions
roles.description: Manage roles and their access rights
roles.builtInInfo: Shiftfy includes four built-in roles with predefined permissions.
roles.customRolesInfo: Custom roles with individual permissions are available from the Business plan.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing for every team size
pricing.subtitle: Shift scheduling, time tracking, and payroll export included in every plan. No hidden fees.
pricing.pricingFaq1Q: Can I switch plans or cancel anytime?
pricing.pricingFaq1A: Yes. You can switch between plans or cancel at any time. Save up to 17% with annual billing. Payments are handled securely via Stripe.
pricing.pricingFaq2A: You automatically switch to the free Starter plan. No credit card required, no automatic renewal.
pricing.pricingFaq3Q: Are there discounts for large teams?
pricing.pricingFaq3A: With the Team and Business plans you pay a flat workspace price — regardless of how many employees you have. For custom requirements with 50+ employees, we offer Enterprise pricing: info@shiftfy.de.
pricing.pricingCtaSubtitle: Start free with up to 5 employees — no risk, no credit card.
pricing.freeDesc: Ideal for testing and small teams up to 5 employees.
pricing.proDesc: For growing teams — unlimited employees, flat rate price.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: Full control for larger organizations with DATEV, API, and analytics.
pricing.customDesc: Custom solution with SSO, SLA, and dedicated onboarding.

landing.heroSubtitle: Track working hours, auto-calculate breaks, verify GPS location — and export to payroll in one click. GDPR-compliant and legally secure.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free with time tracking and upgrade to a flat workspace plan as your team grows. No hidden fees.
landing.step1Desc: Employees clock in and out via the app — with automatic break calculation per German labor law. Optional GPS location for verification.
landing.step1Feature1: Clock in and out with one tap
landing.step1Feature4: Live hour counter in real time
landing.step2Desc: Managers see all time entries at a glance, can correct and approve them. Complete audit trail for full compliance.
landing.step3Desc: Create shift schedules, manage vacation and absences, and let your team swap shifts — all in one system.
landing.step4Desc: Export approved hours as CSV or DATEV, detect overtime, and comply with all record-keeping requirements — automatically.
landing.benefitsSubtitle: Over 20 features for time tracking, shift planning, and workforce management — all in one platform.
landing.benefit1Desc: Clock in and out via app — breaks and overtime are calculated automatically.
landing.benefit2Desc: Optional GPS location on clock-in — so you know where your team is working.
landing.benefit3Desc: Automatic checks for rest periods and record-keeping per German labor law.
landing.benefit4Desc: Export approved hours as CSV or DATEV — ready for your accountant.
landing.benefit5Desc: Vacation, sick leave, and holidays managed in one system.
landing.benefit6Desc: Employees start tracking right away — no training needed.
landing.benefit7Desc: Automatic conversion to decimal time (e.g. 7:45 h → 7.75 h) — perfect for payroll and DATEV.
landing.benefit8Desc: Save recurring shifts as templates and apply them with one click.
landing.benefit9Desc: Employees swap shifts on their own — with optional manager approval.
landing.benefit10Desc: Assign skills and certifications — only qualified staff gets scheduled.
landing.benefit11Desc: Rules for automatic surcharges, notifications, and shift assignments.
landing.benefit12Desc: Who’s working when? Clear calendar view for the entire team.
landing.benefit13Desc: Remaining leave, entitlement, and days taken — all at a glance per employee.
landing.benefit14Desc: Manage multiple locations and departments — each with their own schedules.
landing.benefit15Desc: Track working hours per project for precise cost allocation.
landing.benefit16Desc: Public holidays per state are considered automatically — including surcharge calculations.
landing.faq1A: Yes! The Starter plan is free forever for teams up to 5 employees. For larger teams, the Team and Business plans start at €4.90 per user/month.
landing.faq2Q: How quickly can I get started?
landing.faq2A: In under 5 minutes. Sign up, add your employees, and your team can start tracking hours right away. No credit card required.
landing.faq3A: Absolutely. All data is hosted GDPR-compliant in Germany and transmitted with state-of-the-art encryption.
landing.faq4Q: Can I upgrade or cancel anytime?
landing.faq4A: Yes, you can switch between plans or cancel at any time. Billing is handled securely through Stripe. Save up to 17 % with annual billing.
landing.faq5Q: Is there an app for employees?
landing.faq5A: Shiftfy works as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on any device — just open it in your browser and add it to your home screen. Native iOS/Android apps are coming soon.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to digitize your time tracking?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start for free and discover how easy time tracking can be.
landing.featureTabsSubtitle: One platform for time tracking, shift planning, absences, and reports — clear and intuitive.
landing.featureTab1Desc: Employees clock in and out via the app — with automatic break calculation per German labor law. Live hour counter, GPS location, and project tracking included.
landing.featureTab1Bullet1: Clock in and out with one tap
landing.featureTab2Desc: Create shift schedules with drag & drop, use templates, and distribute plans to your team. Conflicts are detected automatically.
landing.featureTab3Desc: Vacation requests, sick notes, and holidays in one system. With leave account, remaining entitlement, and approval workflow.
landing.featureTab4Desc: Export approved hours, detect overtime, and prepare payroll data for your accountant — CSV or DATEV.
landing.appShowcaseSubtitle: As a Progressive Web App (PWA), Shiftfy is instantly ready on desktop, tablet, and smartphone — no installation needed.
landing.appShowcaseDesktopDesc: Full functionality in the browser — Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge.
landing.appShowcaseMobileDesc: Add PWA to home screen — feels like a native app.
landing.appShowcaseTabletDesc: Optimized layout for iPad and Android tablets.
landing.trustSubtitle: Your data is in good hands — hosted in Germany, GDPR-compliant, and secured with the highest standards.
landing.trustStat1Desc: All data is processed and stored in Germany.
landing.trustStat3Desc: Our support responds quickly — in German and English.
landing.trustStat4Desc: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transfers.

illustrations.planningAria: Shift planning — weekly view with shift blocks
illustrations.distributionAria: Shift distribution — notifications to team members
illustrations.dayToDayAria: Day-to-day management — live dashboard with active shifts

notificationPrefs.title: Email Notifications
notificationPrefs.subtitle: When enabled, you will receive an email for shift assignments and other important updates.
notificationPrefs.emailDesc: Receive emails for shift assignments, absence requests, and other updates.
notificationPrefs.emailInfo: When email notifications are enabled, you will be notified about new shift assignments, approved absences, and other important events. In-app notifications are not affected.
notificationPrefs.fetchError: Could not load settings. Please try again later.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Configure automatic rules for your workspace
automations.subtitle: Control which automations are active. All rules are based on German labor law (ArbZG) and your business requirements.

categories.shiftManagementDesc: Automatic checks and rules for shift planning
categories.timeTrackingDesc: Automatic time entries, breaks, and account calculation
categories.approvalsDesc: Automatic approval of absences and shift swaps

shiftConflictDetection.name: Shift conflict detection
shiftConflictDetection.desc: Automatically detects overlapping shifts, absence conflicts, and availability restrictions when planning shifts.

restPeriodEnforcement.name: Rest period enforcement (ArbZG §5)
restPeriodEnforcement.desc: Ensures at least 11 hours of rest between shifts, as required by German labor law.

cascadeAbsenceCancellation.name: Auto-cancel shifts on absence
cascadeAbsenceCancellation.desc: Automatically cancels all affected shifts when an absence is approved and notifies managers about coverage needs.

autoCreateTimeEntries.name: Auto-create time entries
autoCreateTimeEntries.desc: Automatically creates time entries from past shifts that have not been tracked yet. Runs daily at 02:00.

legalBreakEnforcement.name: Legal break enforcement (ArbZG)
legalBreakEnforcement.desc: Automatically enforces minimum legal breaks: 30 minutes for 6+ hours, 45 minutes for 9+ hours of work.

timeAccountRecalculation.name: Time account recalculation
timeAccountRecalculation.desc: Automatically recalculates time account balances after each confirmed time entry.

recurringShifts.name: Recurring shifts
recurringShifts.desc: Allows creating recurring shifts over multiple weeks with automatic conflict checking.

autoApproveAbsence.name: Auto-approve sick leave
autoApproveAbsence.desc: Automatically approves sick leave (KRANK) immediately and cancels affected shifts. All other absence types (vacation, special leave, etc.) always require manual manager approval.

autoApproveSwap.name: Auto-approve shift swaps
autoApproveSwap.desc: Automatically approves shift swap requests when neither employee has conflicts from the swap.

overtimeAlerts.name: Overtime alerts
overtimeAlerts.desc: Automatically notifies managers when employees exceed their contracted weekly hours.

payrollAutoLock.name: Payroll auto-lock
payrollAutoLock.desc: Automatically locks all reviewed time entries 5 days after month end to prevent retroactive changes.

notifications.name: System notifications
notifications.desc: Sends automatic notifications to employees and managers for shift assignments, approvals, and status changes.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie Settings
cookieBanner.description: We use cookies to ensure website functionality and improve our service. Technically necessary cookies are always set. Analytics cookies are only set with your consent (§ 25 TDDDG, Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). Learn more in our
cookieBanner.settingsDescription: Choose which categories of cookies you would like to allow. Necessary cookies cannot be disabled.
cookieBanner.necessaryDesc: These cookies are essential for basic website functions (login, language setting, security). They cannot be disabled (§ 25(2)(2) TDDDG).
cookieBanner.analyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand website usage and detect errors (e.g. Sentry error monitoring). No data is shared with advertising networks.
cookieBanner.marketingDesc: No marketing cookies are currently used. This category is reserved for future integrations.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips and news on time tracking, workforce management, and labor law.
blog.ctaSubtitle: Start free with up to 5 employees — no credit card required.
blog.post1Excerpt: Learn how to design your shift plan efficiently, increase employee satisfaction, and comply with legal requirements.
blog.post2Title: Working Hours Act 2025 — What Employers Need to Know
blog.post2Excerpt: An overview of the key changes in the Working Hours Act and their impact on your workforce planning.
blog.post3Excerpt: Strategies and tools to retain employees in shift-based operations long-term and reduce turnover.
blog.post4Title: Digital Punch Clock: Advantages Over Paper
blog.post4Excerpt: Why companies are switching to digital time tracking and how Shiftfy makes the transition easy.
